commit_message: Fix for 1351 mouse buttons handling in some games (bricks 'n ball, duck hunt) Fix for 1351 mouse buttons handling in some games (bricks 'n ball, duck hunt) Restored 1351 mouse OR logic ( mouse movement via POT lines & mouse buttons via joystick fire line) while keeping NEOS state machine untouched (position sent as nibbles on direction lines & synchronized via fire line clock)
